verses.1: Praise the LORD! Praise the LORD, my soul!
verses.2: I will praise the LORD while I live; I will sing praises to my God while I have my being.
verses.3: Do not trust in noblemen, In mortal man, in whom there is no salvation.
verses.4: His spirit departs, he returns to the earth; On that very day his plans perish.
verses.5: Blessed is he whose help is the God of Jacob, Whose hope is in the LORD his God,
verses.6: Who made heaven and earth, The sea and everything that is in them; Who keeps faith forever;
verses.7: Who executes justice for the oppressed; Who gives food to the hungry. The LORD frees the prisoners.
verses.8: The LORD opens the eyes of those who are blind; The LORD raises up those who are bowed down; The LORD loves the righteous.
verses.9: The LORD watches over strangers; He supports the fatherless and the widow, But He thwarts the way of the wicked.
verses.10: The LORD will reign forever, Your God, Zion, to all generations. Praise the LORD!
